# comfyui_image_color_to_mask (Resource)

ComfyUI ImageColorToMask node [mask]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (Number) Input: INT default: 0
- `image` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Read-Only
